results.title: CONNECTA Therapeutics Initiates Phase IIa Clinical Trial of CTH120, a First-in-Class Neuroplasticity Modulator, in Fragile X Syndrome
results.description: CONNECTA Therapeutics initiates Phase IIa trial advancing treatments for rare CNS disorders, strengthening its clinical pipeline and development strategy.
